en_title: Marvel Rivals Fans Think the New Captain America Skin Is a Mod, But It's Actually Just His Rod
cn_title: 《漫威争锋》美队泳装皮肤被玩家误认成Mod
subtitle: 这真不是Mod
opus_summary: 网易为《漫威争锋》推出美国队长泳装皮肤「海滨哨兵」，造型夸张到不少玩家以为是粉丝Mod。IGN确认该皮肤确实真实存在，并可在游戏商店购买。

paragraphs.en: NetEase Games is celebrating the 4th of July with a Marvel Rivals swimsuit skin that comes bundled with Captain America's big package.
paragraphs.cn: 网易游戏正在用一款《漫威争锋》泳装皮肤庆祝7月4日，而这套皮肤还附带了美国队长的大礼包。

paragraphs.en: It's been hard to avoid the comic book hero shooter for the last few days as fans flock to react to the First Avenger's new cosmetic. This latest in a line of revealing swimsuit outfits for Marvel Rivals' ever-expanding roster of heroes and villains includes beachwear for Loki and White Fox, too, but the Captain America skin really lays it on thick.
paragraphs.cn: 过去几天，你很难避开这款漫画英雄射击游戏，因为粉丝们纷纷对这位初代复仇者的新外观作出反应。在《漫威争锋》不断扩大的英雄和反派阵容中，这已经是一系列暴露泳装造型的最新一批，其中也包括Loki和White Fox的海滩装，但美国队长这套皮肤确实用力过猛。

paragraphs.en: Called Seaside Sentinel, the outfit gives Captain America a USA summer makeover just in time for the holiday. Those who purchase the cosmetic will allow Steve Rogers to ditch his usual battle-ready attire in favor of little more than an inflatable ducky shield and, of course, a very, very tight mankini. The jiggle physics are the icing on the cake.
paragraphs.cn: 这套名为「海滨哨兵」的服装正好赶上节日，给美国队长来了一个美国夏日改造。购买这款外观后，Steve Rogers会脱下通常适合战斗的装束，换成几乎只有一个充气小鸭盾牌，以及当然，一件非常非常紧的男士连体泳装。晃动效果则是锦上添花。

paragraphs.en: The First Avenger is the first to the fun! 🏖️
paragraphs.cn: 初代复仇者第一个加入乐趣！🏖️

paragraphs.en: "The beach crew voted Captain America should man the grill, just like the red, white, and blue-blooded specimen of American masculinity people believe he is. Unfortunately, his skills on the grill were not nearly as calculated as his… pic.twitter.com/B3tRSt9QjM
paragraphs.cn: 「海滩小队投票决定，美国队长应该负责烤架，就像人们认为他是红、白、蓝血统的美国男性气概标本一样。不幸的是，他的烧烤技术远没有他的……」

paragraphs.en: "The beach crew voted Captain America should man the grill," an official description for the swimsuit skin says, "just like the red, white, and blue-blooded specimen of American masculinity people believe he is. Unfortunately, his skills on the grill were not nearly as calculated as his shield throws."
paragraphs.cn: 这款泳装皮肤的官方描述写道：「海滩小队投票决定，美国队长应该负责烤架，就像人们认为他是红、白、蓝血统的美国男性气概标本一样。不幸的是，他的烧烤技术远没有他的盾牌投掷那么精准。」

paragraphs.en: Captain America is so bulky here that it looks almost like an accurate recreation of that infamous Rob Liefeld drawing , and it's got many wondering if the images and videos circulating around the internet are from a fan-made mod. There's no need to fear, though, as IGN can confirm that the outfit and all of its contents are indeed very real and available to purchase through the Marvel Rivals store.
paragraphs.cn: 这里的美国队长壮到几乎像是对那张臭名昭著Rob Liefeld画作的准确复刻，也让许多人怀疑网上流传的图片和视频是不是来自粉丝自制Mod。不过无需担心，IGN可以确认，这套服装以及其中包含的一切确实非常真实，并且可以通过《漫威争锋》商店购买。

paragraphs.en: Regardless of whether you're on a friendly or enemy team, there's a good chance you'll be distracted if another player waltzes out in Seaside Sentinel. As if you needed any proof of that, look no further than social media reactions across the internet.
paragraphs.cn: 无论你是在友方队伍还是敌方队伍，只要另一个玩家穿着「海滨哨兵」大摇大摆走出来，你很可能都会分心。如果你还需要任何证明，看看互联网上各处社交媒体反应就够了。

paragraphs.en: modders realizing netease doing their jobs for them pic.twitter.com/UDpgX8r0fm
paragraphs.cn: Mod作者发现网易已经替他们把活干了。

paragraphs.en: "Bro Steve stole Thor's hammer," one Reddit user .
paragraphs.cn: 一名Reddit用户说：「兄弟，Steve偷了Thor的锤子。」
另一人说：「字面意义上的美国翘臀，这就是我的GOAT。」
一名X/Twitter用户补充道：「他妈终于来了。」

paragraphs.en: Despite NetEase's insistence that it doesn't intentionally create "gooner content" for its heroes and villains, Marvel Rivals fans have long called attention to its reliance on revealing outfits. At least as more swimwear joins the collection, players can rest easy knowing Captain America gets a slice of that cake.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管网易坚称自己并非有意为旗下英雄和反派制作「媚宅内容」，《漫威争锋》粉丝长期以来一直注意到游戏对暴露服装的依赖。至少随着更多泳装加入收藏，玩家可以安心知道，美国队长也分到了一块蛋糕。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Rivals is available now for PC, Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X | S. Other heroes who received swimsuit skins include Daredevil and Black Widow .
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威争锋》现已登陆PC、任天堂Switch 2、PlayStation 4、PlayStation 5和XBOX Series。获得泳装皮肤的其他英雄还包括夜魔侠和黑寡妇。
